name: @zenuml/core
when_to_use: 需要把一段类代码的 ZenUML DSL 编译成 lifeline 精确、fragment 正确嵌套的时序图 SVG 时用它,而非手绘 SVG——原生在 lifeline 几何、activation bar、alt/opt/loop/par 嵌套与对象创建/自调用上失败。它是 mermaid `zenuml` 图类型的引擎;当你要在严格 CSP 下独立、可控地渲染,或需要比 mermaid 默认 sequenceDiagram 更丰富的 fragment/创建语义时直接用它;非通用流程图或类图。
why_valuable: AI 能写出 DSL,却做不到稳定求解 lifeline 布局、activation 深度、fragment 嵌套与消息路由;徒手画时序 SVG 会出现箭头交叠、lifeline 漂移、嵌套错乱。@zenuml/core 用 antlr4 解析 DSL 并确定性地布局为工程级 SVG。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-drawing SVG when you need to compile code-like ZenUML DSL into a sequence-diagram SVG with precise lifelines and correctly nested fragments, because native implementations fail at lifeline geometry, activation bars, alt/opt/loop/par nesting, object creation, and self-calls. It is the engine for mermaid's `zenuml` diagram type; use it directly when you need independent, controllable rendering under strict CSP or richer fragment/creation semantics than mermaid's default sequenceDiagram. Not for general flowcharts or class diagrams.
en.why_valuable: AI can write the DSL but cannot stably solve lifeline layout, activation depth, fragment nesting, and message routing; hand-drawn sequence SVG produces overlapping arrows, drifting lifelines, and incorrect nesting. @zenuml/core parses the DSL with antlr4 and deterministically lays it out as engineering-grade SVG.

data_in.note: code is ZenUML DSL, not mermaid sequenceDiagram syntax: `A.method`=synchronous call, `A->B: msg`=asynchronous message, `-->`=return, `{}`=nested sub-call, `if/else/while/opt/par/alt/try-catch-finally`=fragment, `new X`=object creation, and `@Actor/@Starter`=participant annotation. boot uses the pure renderToSvg function rather than instantiating the React editor path with new ZenUml().

schema.code: string -- ZenUML DSL source; an empty string returns an empty <svg>

spec.note: renderToSvg returns a complete SVG with its own viewBox, and height grows with the number of messages; give the carrier an explicit 400px height with two-axis scrolling, set svg.style.maxWidth to none to preserve intrinsic dimensions, and do not use vh or percentage heights (rule 3).

data_in.note: code 是 ZenUML DSL(非 mermaid sequenceDiagram 语法):`A.method`=同步调用,`A->B: msg`=异步消息,`-->`=返回,`{}`嵌套子调用,`if/else/while/opt/par/alt/try-catch-finally`=fragment,`new X`=对象创建,`@Actor/@Starter`=参与者标注。boot 走纯函数 renderToSvg,不实例化 new ZenUml() 的 React 编辑器路径。

schema.code: string —— ZenUML DSL 源码;空串返回空 <svg>

spec.note: renderToSvg 返回自带 viewBox 的完整 SVG,高度随消息数增长;承载区给显式 400px 高并双向滚动,把 svg.style.maxWidth 设 none 保持 intrinsic 尺寸,禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: ZenUML DSL 非 AI 原生记法,minimal 钉死同步调用/嵌套/返回三种基本构造。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:纯 JS 生成 SVG 字符串,主题内联,理论可用,待 renderToSvg 真机渲染确认
carriers.widget: supported:renderToSvg 返回自包含 SVG 字符串写入 shadow;无 head 注样式/无 worker/无 wasm 在此路径
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG 字符串,无 worker/wasm/uplink 依赖

isolation.evidence: API verified vs @zenuml/core@4.2.0: +esm exports `{Og as default, iM as renderToSvg}` (F); types/index.d.ts: `renderToSvg(code:string, options?:{theme?:'theme-default'|'theme-mermaid'}) => {svg,innerSvg,width,height,viewBox}` — schema code/theme consumed exactly. renderToSvg(iM) 起始即 parse+geometry,文本量测走 OffscreenCanvas(源码 `typeof OffscreenCanvas<'u'?new OffscreenCanvas(1,1).getContext('2d'):document.createElement('canvas')`),返回的 svg 内含 `<style>`+`<defs>`(自包含,主题样式内联而非注 head)。globalStyleInjection=no:bundle 里的 document.head.append(<style>) 与 headlessui-portal-root 都属 `new ZenUml()` 交互编辑器 + getPng/getSvg(react-dom createRoot ×2 / html-to-image toSvg/toPng)路径,boot 用纯 renderToSvg 全避开。globalDomMutation=yes:render 路径含一处 `body.appendChild(t); l.getBBox().width; document.body.removeChild(...)` 的瞬时文本量测(同步 append+remove,非持久泄漏)。globalEvents=no:renderToSvg 不挂全局监听。bundle 有 1 处 WebAssembly 引用,不在 parse/layout 路径。
